name: Special Cocoa Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Hersheys Recipes Pamplet, 1930's
1. Mix cocoa and brown sugar in a saucepan; add hot water and stir until smooth. Bring to a boil, then cook slowly for 3 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring constantly. Cool.
2. Sift flour once, then measure and mix with baking powder, soda, and salt. Sift twice.
3. Cream shortening until softened; add sugar gradually, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Beat in vanilla, then eggs one at a time, beating until fluffy after each addition. Add the cooled cocoa mixture; stir until blended. Add flour mixture alternately with milk, beating until smooth after each addition.
5. Turn batter into 2 greased (9-inch) layer pans. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) about 25 minutes.
